emotional_tone: Calm control, premium intelligence, proactive power

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light

typography.notes: Outfit for strong, premium tech headlines. JetBrains Mono for exact performance data (ROAS, CTR, Spend). Satoshi for highly readable body text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing Philosophy: use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Inner elements use gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col grids. Tight gap-4 or gap-6 for data relation. Height full on children for exact alignment.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense data, labels, inputs. Center-align empty states or hero headers.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: 1px delicate inner stroke on glass surfaces (border-[#10B981]/10). Solid flat backgrounds for dense dashboard cards to prevent visual refraction.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp or max rounded-md. Primary: bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-400. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-500/10.
components.cards: Cardless or flat dark surfaces. bg-[#0D1411] border border-[#10B981]/10 rounded-lg. No soft drop shadows, rely on 1px borders.
components.data_tables: Dense. text-sm. Hover states slightly lighten row bg to #131C18.
components.charts: Recharts with custom tooltips. Use Emerald for main metric, Amber for risk, Red for drop-offs. Gridlines must be extremely faint (stroke-opacity 0.1).
components.fatigue_gauge: 0-100 gauge. Use an arc or linear progress bar. 0-40 (Red), 40-70 (Amber), 70-100 (Emerald).
components.status_pills: Small, rounded-full. px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono. text-{status} bg-{status}/10 border border-{status}/20.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards translate-y-[-2px] with border color brightening to border-[#10B981]/30. Always set explicit hover text color.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton screens with a subtle emerald shimmer (mask-image gradient animation) rather than generic spinners.

icons_and_assets.style: Clean, thin stroke (1.5). Do not use solid icons unless indicating 'active' state.

backgrounds.description: Abstract green wave patterns on a dark background - use for auth page background or AI Studio header overlay
Vibrant green ink swirling underwater creates a mesmerizing abstract texture - use for hero section or premium dark mode textural accents

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case, e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button' or data-testid='fatigue-gauge-meta'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement 'Emerald Noir' theme exactly: #050A08 background, #0D1411 surfaces, #10B981 emerald accents. Never use pure black or default Tailwind slate without tinting.
Dashboard must contain a 'Creatives Command Center' with sortable table (data-testid='creatives-table').
Implement 'AI Studio' where users can select a fatiguing creative and generate replacement copy (Meta, TikTok, etc.).
Use Recharts or Shadcn charts for ROAS trends and CTR trends.
Build a custom 'Fatigue Score' gauge component (0-100 scale).
Include a CSV/Excel upload adapter component that parses file data into the dashboard.
All navigation and layout structure should use 'MODE B: Control Room Grid' for dense, usable data presentation.
Include predictive fatigue forecasting numbers (e.g., 'Est. 3 days left') in the UI.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, links, and major layout sections.
